checks.command: $pending = @(); if(Test-Path 'HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Component Based Servicing\RebootPending') { $pending += 'CBS' }; if(Test-Path 'HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\WindowsUpdate\Auto Update\RebootRequired') { $pending += 'WindowsUpdate' }; if(Get-ItemProperty 'HKLM:\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Session Manager' -Name PendingFileRenameOperations -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { $pending += 'FileRename' }; if($pending) { 'Neustart erforderlich wegen: ' + ($pending -join ', ') } else { 'Kein Neustart ausstehend' }

checks.label: Ursache identifizieren
checks.command: Get-WinEvent -FilterHashtable @{LogName='System'; Id=1074,6006,6008; StartTime=(Get-Date).AddDays(-7)} -MaxEvents 5 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object TimeCreated, Id, Message

checks.label: Uptime pruefen
checks.command: Get-CimInstance Win32_OperatingSystem | Select-Object LastBootUpTime; (Get-Date) - (Get-CimInstance Win32_OperatingSystem).LastBootUpTime | Select-Object Days, Hours

checks.label: Provisioned AppX Pakete
checks.command: Get-AppxProvisionedPackage -Online | Where-Object { $_.DisplayName -match 'BubbleWitch|CandyCrush|Disney|Facebook|Flipboard|Minecraft|Netflix|Spotify|Twitter|TikTok|Solitaire|MarchOf|Bing' } | Select-Object DisplayName

checks.label: ContentDeliveryManager
checks.command: Get-ItemProperty 'HKCU:\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\ContentDeliveryManager' -Name SilentInstalledAppsEnabled, PreInstalledAppsEnabled, OemPreInstalledAppsEnabled -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
checks.evaluate: if(result.contains('1')) warning('Content Delivery Manager installiert automatisch Apps')

checks.label: Consumer Features
checks.command: Get-ItemProperty 'HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\CloudContent' -Name DisableWindowsConsumerFeatures -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue

checks.label: Game DVR pruefen
checks.command: Get-ItemProperty 'HKCU:\System\GameConfigStore' -Name GameDVR_Enabled -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-ItemProperty 'HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\GameDVR' -Name AllowGameDVR -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue

checks.label: Druckertreiber Typ pruefen
checks.command: Get-PrinterDriver | Select-Object Name, MajorVersion, PrinterEnvironment | Format-Table

checks.label: Treiber-Version pruefen
checks.command: Get-PrinterDriver | ForEach-Object { [PSCustomObject]@{Name=$_.Name; Version=$_.DriverVersion; Manufacturer=$_.Manufacturer} } | Format-Table

checks.label: Spooler-Dateien pruefen
checks.command: Get-ChildItem 'C:\Windows\System32\spool\PRINTERS' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object | Select-Object Count
checks.evaluate: if(result.contains('0')) info('Spooler leer'); else warning('Dateien im Spooler-Ordner: ' + result)

checks.label: Testseite Status
checks.command: Get-Printer | Select-Object Name, DriverName, PrinterStatus, JobCount | Format-Table
